hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Standing house rule for every project: keep a CLAUDE.md at the repo root as living project memory. If the repo has no CLAUDE.md, create one once you understand the project — architecture, key files and directories, how to run and deploy, conventions, and gotchas (or run the /init command). As the session wraps up, after the users work is done, update ./CLAUDE.md to capture anything learned this session: new decisions, run and deploy steps, gotchas, and notable changes. Keep it concise and current, and commit it alongside your other changes."}}'
